entry.title: How to remove inifinity sign from export in ui5
entry.content:
HI Everyone, 

I am worrking on a ui5 project, where i am using sap smart table with tree table and data is coming from ODataV2. The smart table comes with export to excel function. But it doesn't show the total number of records while exporting instead it shows infinity sign. how can i replace it with the total number of records/rows :

 

Thanks,

SAPUI5

entry.title: RAP - function payload from body
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

We have a complex object which we want to pass to a RAP static function. This should then return data to us. The object has no fixed size and is deep. Passing all parameters in the URL is therefore not the best way.


At the moment we are using an action, but the csrf token is sometimes very time-consuming and we want to avoid that.

In .net there is the possibility to pack the payload into the body: https://github.com/xuzhg/WebApiSample/blob/main/v8.x/FunctionTest/readme.md#2-use-the-request-body-data
Is there something similar in RAP?

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - Sales Order Odata API - How to Add Filter to Expanded Attribute
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Could anyone please guide me on how to add a filter to an expanded attribute?

Here is an example for your reference: The following URL expands the items (Sales Order Item) and aligns them with the Sales Order:

URL: https://xxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder()?$expand=to_Item

However, when I try to add a filter inside the expand operator, it doesn't seem to work:

URL: https://xxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder('2')?$expand=to_Item($filter=SDProcessStatus eq 'A')

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Rahul Jain

entry.title: How to save Odata data in SAP BUILD APP in PDF format.
entry.content:
I am created a project in SAP Build App and data in coming from Odata link in UI also.
Now, I want to save that data in PDF format.

entry.title: Issue Consuming OpenAPI OData from SAP Datasphere in Node.js – Access Token Returns Login Link Inste
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I’m working on a project where I need to consume data from SAP Datasphere via OData using OpenAPI in Node.js. I've already set up an application to obtain credentials, successfully made the authentication request, and retrieved the access token.

The issue now is that when I use the access token to pull the data, instead of receiving the JSON data as expected, I get a login link in the response. I've double-checked the request structure and authentication configurations, but I still can't resolve this issue.

Has anyone encountered this before or could suggest any necessary adjustments to get the API to return data in JSON format?

Any guidance or practical examples would be greatly appreciated!

Code:

const { executeHttpRequest } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/core');
const axios = require('axios');

async function getAccessToken(clientId, clientSecret) {
    const tokenUrl = 'https://url_url_url.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token'; // URL de token correta
    const response = await axios.post(tokenUrl,
      new URLSearchParams({
        client_id: clientId,
        client_secret: clientSecret,
        grant_type: 'client_credentials'
      }),
      {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }
      }
    );
    return response.data.access_token;
  }
 
  async function executeRequest(accessToken) {
    const response = await axios.get(
      'https://url_url_url.us10.hcs.cloud.sap/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/DW_NEL/AM_MOV_V5/AM_MOV_V5',
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`
        }
      }
    );
    console.log(response.data);
  }

(async () => {
  try {
    const accessToken = await getAccessToken('Client ID', 'Client Secret');
    await executeRequest(accessToken);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Erro na execução da API:', error);
  }
})();


RETURN:
<html><head><link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" /><script>document.cookie="fragmentAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.hash)+";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";document.cookie="locationAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.href.split('#')[0].substring(location.href.split('#')[0].indexOf(location.host) + location.host.length))+";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";document.cookie="signature=J3wPRHL%2FOV5vrzdIeTdo1n2w9%2F8%3D;path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";location="https://url_url_url.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-approuter-sac-sacus10!t655&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Furl_url_url.us10.hcs.cloud.sap%2Fsso%2Flogin%2Fcallback&state=b9df485-5eb-46ed-9bb3-302bd2264"</script></head></html>

entry.title: Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver
entry.content:
I am receiving the following error when trying to query an entity from my odata service: 

Error: Multiple identifiers not supported for OnDevice driver

This is how my datastructure looks like (it's from the official SAP Asset Performance Management API)

 

Has any one ever faced this error before and knows a way to overcome it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: python script that uses oauth2.0 with 'api access' without manuel login to fetch data via odata?
entry.content:
Python script to get Datasphere data via odata api:

I have seen some guides to create oauth2.0 client and make rest calls to datasphere odata apis via Postman. However, that  oauth2.0 client uses the 'interactive' purpose option with a callback uri. That means i have to manually login on browser or open the link to get the first token and then continue querying via the odata api. This method works fine, however, it cannot be used for production script that pulls data from a Datasphere view every day.

For this reason, I tried with a oauthclient2.0 with 'api access' purpose and 'client_credentials'  as authorization, in order to avoid manual login. With the client_id and secret, i am able to call the token_url and receive a token. However, when i use this token to query any view or table in datasphere, it returns the login page html elements as text in the response.  
So my question is it possible to somehow avoid manual login and run a python script locally or in Azure cloud Function to get data from Datasphere via odata apis. 

@Asim_Munshi @gustavokath

entry.title: OData API request not working when Datasphere is set with SSO
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I have an OData URL that I use to get data from my Analytical Model in Datasphere:

the URL is:  https://tcodataspherefree.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/TCO_DATA_MODEL/Landscape_daily_cost_capacity_metering/Landscape_daily_cost_capacity_metering?$top=10

It works just fine if I use it in my browser after I sign in with SSO.

But when I want to call it through a python code, after setting up OAuth on Datasphere, I am not getting any data back from the URL. I assume it is because the SSO is set.

Is there any way to get around that?

Many thanks

Sam

entry.title: The 'or' operation is not working across different property names when using substringof
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working with an OData service and have encountered a limitation that I'm hoping to get some help with.

Here's the context: I'm using the following OData query to filter data based on specific conditions:

$filter=substringof('stann', Email) or substringof('stann', FormattedName)&$format=json

it seems like the or operation is not working across different property names when using substringof. Has anyone experienced a similar issue, and if so, were you able to find a workaround or fix? Is there a specific syntax or method in OData that I might be missing?

The Error I'm receiving is

"error": {
        "code": "ERROR",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Error in filter System Query, Operation failed::Operands of logical operator '' are not valid"
        }
    }

entry.title: RAP Odata V4 APIs from S4HANA public cloud not visible in BAS
entry.content:
I have created a RAP Application in S4HANA Public cloud using ADT. I have expodes this application as an OData V4 UI service. The preview of the application works fine.

I created a BTP destination for the S4HANA Public Cloud dev system (client 080).
The destination properties have WebIDEEnabled = true and WebIDEUsage = odata_abap,dev_abap,odata_gen

In SAP Business Application Studio, when I create a Fiori List Report using Template and choose the S4HANA public cloud destination, I am unable to find my Odata V4 service.I can see only OData V2 services.

I could not find much hints in SAP community blogs except that in few blogs they have mentioned settings w.r.t /IWFND/CONFIG and other V4 service group nodes but then all of these are On Premise related.

Is there a restriction on the availability of OData V4 Service in BAS? Or am I missing any configuration.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTIT'
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to make a POST OData call in the Gateway client, but I am encountering the following error:

"Creating operations are disabled for entity '$AE_UIX#SRVD#ZSD_WTY_CLAIM~ZWTY_CLAIM_CUSTOM_ENTITY'."

We have created a wrapper class that calls the BAPI `BAPI_WARRANTYCLAIM_CREATE`. Additionally, we have developed an OData service using RAP.

Could you please help me understand how to resolve this issue?

Thank you!

entry.title: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Since Sunday, we have been receiving an error in our oData Import Jobs that update the Data Access Control in the Public Dimension Table as 'An unexpected error occurred while trying to update the dimension data.' Could this be related to the SAC 2024 Q4 update? Does anyone have any information?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: In Fiori Element Screen CREATE operation of child entities is not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have created a Fiori element screen for our API. So earlier everything was working fine. But a couple of days ago, we observed that the CREATE operation of child entities was not working. CREATE is visible on screen, so while clicking on CREATE nothing is happening, and there are no call logs under the network tab of the developers tool while clicking on CREATE. And also, we don't have any recent code changes. We have implemented Draft with early numbering and its type of unmanaged implementation. How It is not working all of sudden. Does anyone face this issue, or can someone help with this issue??

 

And in console while loading the screen, I am getting the below errors.

 

Thank You

entry.title: how to Get logged in User details in custom SAP FIORI from ECC
entry.content:
I am working on retrieving user details in my Fiori app. The backend system is ECC 6.0, and I am using OData for communication.

any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: $batch process to delete single or multiple Vendor from BusinessPartner number
entry.content:
Hey.

Here I try to delete a Vendor from BusinessPartner number - '101127'. I am using the $batch process to delete the Vendor but don't know it throw error as - Batch request payload is invalid.

Please help me to resolve this. here I attach a screenshot for the reference.

Please tell me the step by step process that what changes I have to make to correct this.
Thanks in advance.


OData  SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Fiori Elements odata V4 List Report missing option to select all columns
entry.content:
Dear community,

we noticed that in Fiori Elements List Reports built with oData V4 - both standard and custom ones, the option to "select all" columns in the table view setting dialog is missing (replaced by de-select all). Is it possible to adjust this either by any manifest settings or annotations? I couldn't find any resource for this.

In oData V2 List Report the "select all" checkbox is available in the view settings dialog.

entry.title: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returning XML instead of JSON
entry.content:
Hi community!

I'm using the API /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product to create products via Http call. According to the API documentation (https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCT_SRV_0001/path/post_A_Product), the content of the response should be a JSON object in both success and error case scenarios, but I'm getting an XML response content.

I'm sending a JSON object in my request body and setting the content type header as "application/json". I have been able to successfully create products by sending POST requests to this end-point but I'm still receiving an XML object in the response content.

If I add the query parameter "$format=json" to my request URL, I get a Bad Request response saying that my request contains invalid parameters, but this time the response content is a JSON object.

What should I do in order to get a JSON response as described in the documentation.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Create _CDS API service with ABAP coding.
entry.content:
Hello,
i have a task for creation of a new OData API.
I would like to use a simple CDS view with @odata.publish: true
and to reuse an existing custom logic which has been written in ABAP.
Is that approach possible at all?

*details:
When the service is generated there is customizing created which referes to a Data Provider Class : CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC. However i can not find a way to change this customization and to set up a new Z class here and furthermore the class CL_SADL_GTK_EXPOSURE_DPC is a final class.

Maybe the only possibility is to reuse this new CDS in SEGW ?

Thanks,
Rosen

entry.title: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content:
I am Working on a Deep Entity post odata request I am facing a challenge while adding multivalue-array in properties.
my JSON format is quit complex :

{

    "tourUpdateEventType": "FROZEN",

    "tourDetail": {

        "tourId": "",

        "transporterId": "",

        "transporterName": "Default transporter",

        "vehicleModelId": "",

        "vehicleModelName": "SUZUKI",

        "vehicleId": "",

        "tourStartTime": "",

        "tourEndTime": "",

        "tourTravelDistance": 5955,

        "isSortedForTour": false,

        "isMultiTrip": false

    },

    "orders": [

        {

            "id": "",

            "sourceOrderId": "",

            "type": "DROP",

            "date": "2024-11-07",

            "slot": {

                "start": "2024-11-07T02:00:00.000+0000",

                "end": "2024-11-07T17:00:00.000+0000"

            },

            "channel": "DISPATCH_IQ",

            "orderStatus": "PLANNED",

            "actor": {

                "id": "mara/personnel/rupsinghg"

            },

            "triggerTime": "2024-11-07T11:06:19.074+0000",

            "lineItems": [],

            "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [],

            "teamId": "1012-KS1",

            "quantities": [],

            "homebaseId": "1012",

            "homebaseEta": "2024-11-07T05:02:00.000+0000",

            "homebaseCompleteOtp": "5544",

            "customerCompleteOtp": "1868",

            "cancellationOtp": "1868",

            "customerReturnOtp": "6412",

            "locationId": "1012-KS1-01-0004300012",

            "planIteration": 1,

            "tourDetail": {

                "sequence": 1,

                "isSortedForTour": false

            },

            "initialEta": "2024-11-07T05:11:22.000+0000",

            "initialEtd": "2024-11-07T05:19:22.000+0000",

            "orchestrationMetadata": {

                "waybills": []

            },

            "amountTransaction": {

                "refId": "40e649bef5374ebb87c432c658a50ad5",

                "amount": {

                    "amount": 3,

                    "currency": "PKR"

                },

                "exchangeType": "NONE"

            }

        }

    ],

    "timestamp": "2024-11-07T11:06:23.338+0000"

}
facing problem in :

"lineItems": [], "lineItemTransactionStatuses": [], kindly help
